headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 14, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros fell to the Seattle Mariners 6-2, with Josh Naylor leading the Astros' offense with 2 home runs and 5 RBIs. George Kirby pitched 7.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs for the Mariners. In other news, the Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-9 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Jeremiah Jackson leading the charge at the plate. Jackson's impressive performance included three hits, two home runs, and five RBIs.

Several players have been placed on the injured list. Ethan Roberts, a right-handed pitcher for the Chicago Cubs, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right middle finger laceration. The injury is retroactive to April 13, 2026. Additionally, Jonathan Cannon, a right-handed pitcher for the Chicago White Sox, has been placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 13, 2026, due to right hip inflammation.

The Philadelphia Phillies made a roster move ahead of Thursday's game, trading RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money. The Cincinnati Reds traded 1B Christian Encarnacion-Strand to the Baltimore Orioles for cash, while the Chicago White Sox traded 2B Lenyn Sosa to the Toronto Blue Jays for OF Jordan Rich and Future Considerations.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Mariners in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners took down the Houston Astros 6-2, securing a decisive victory. Josh Naylor led the Astros' offense with 2 home runs and 5 RBIs, but it wasn't enough to overcome the strong performance of George Kirby, who pitched 7.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall to Orioles in Thrilling 7-9 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-9 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Jeremiah Jackson leading the charge at the plate. Jackson's impressive performance included three hits, two home runs, and five RBIs, while Dean Kremer pitched 5.0 strong innings with 9 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Blowout Loss to Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals fell to the Pittsburgh Pirates 16-5 in a lopsided game. Paul Skenes earned the win for the Pirates with 6.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Phillies Rout Cubs 13-7**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Chicago Cubs in a lopsided 13-7 victory. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with two home runs and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cubs' Ethan Roberts Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Chicago Cubs right-handed pitcher Ethan Roberts has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right middle finger laceration. The injury is retroactive to April 13, 2026.

top_news.title: **Phillies Make Roster Move Ahead of Thursday's Game**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies have traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money.
